decode.title: Genomi Dashboard (decode)
decode.start_when: The agent runs the /genomi decode kicker or otherwise needs Genomi to build and render the consolidated Genomi Dashboard HTML artifact.

decode.build_dashboard_evidence.description: Build Genomi Dashboard panel states from the approved Active Genome Index and existing capability operations. Used by decode.render_dashboard; presented output reports panel readiness, running jobs, and gaps.

panels.description: Optional subset of dashboard panels to gather. Omitted means every dashboard panel.

risk_score_ids.description: Optional PGS IDs to score for the risk panel. Omitted means use imported local scores up to risk_score_limit.

risk_score_limit.description: Maximum imported local PGS scores to calculate when risk_score_ids is omitted.

nutrigenomics_domain_ids.description: Optional nutrigenomics domains to retrieve. Omitted means every declared in-scope domain.

decode.render_dashboard.description: Build, shape, render, and expose the Genomi Dashboard self-contained HTML artifact from the approved Active Genome Index.

panels.description: Optional subset of dashboard categories to gather and render. Omitted means every dashboard category.

risk_score_ids.description: Optional PGS IDs to score for the risk panel. Omitted means use imported local scores up to risk_score_limit.

risk_score_limit.description: Maximum imported local PGS scores to calculate when risk_score_ids is omitted.

nutrigenomics_domain_ids.description: Optional nutrigenomics domains to retrieve. Omitted means every declared in-scope domain.

output.description: Optional override for the dashboard HTML path. Defaults to a transient path under the system temp dir: <tmp>/genomi-dashboards/<sample>/dashboard.html.
